steps.title: Identify the shift from general claim to specific examples
steps.content: The passage moves from the broad statement “Comics by other Black cartoonists followed” directly to naming specific cartoonists (Robb Armstrong and Keith Knight) with their years. The transition must bridge this shift.

steps.title: Apply the general-to-specific pattern
steps.content: ”For instance” introduces concrete examples supporting a general claim. The other options either reverse the timeline, introduce a false contrast, or suggest alternatives rather than examples. That matches choice D — D is correct.
